title: Ring-A-Ring.
content:
Ring-a-ring of little boys.
    Ring-a-ring of girls;
    All around all around,
    Twists and twirls.

    You are merry children;
    "Yes, we are."
    Where do you come from?
    "Not very far.

    "We live in the mountain,
    We live in the tree;
    And I live in the river-bed,
    And you won't catch me!"
meaning:
"Ring-A-Ring." is a quintessential example of Kate Greenaway's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
